# Roamio

> The fluid travel OS for exploring Kenya and beyond — stays, safaris, flights, food, transport and experiences orchestrated into one journey.

Roamio lets travellers discover curated listings by country and service, build saveable itineraries, request bookings, plan complete trips with an AI trip builder, and earn membership perks via Roamio Rewards.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with featured stays, experiences and destinations.
- [AI Trip Builder](/trip-builder): Generate a complete day-by-day trip with flights, stays, transport and experiences.
- [Roamio Rewards](/rewards): Membership tiers with stay and transport discounts and concierge perks.
- [Kenya](/kenya): Country hub with stays, experiences, flights, attractions, food and transport.

## Optional

- [Italy](/italy)
- [Croatia](/croatia)
- [Montenegro](/montenegro)
- [Egypt](/egypt)
- [Japan](/japan)
